name: SOUTHERN MISSOURI BANCORP, INC.
summary: Southern Missouri Bancorp, Inc. (SMBC) is a bank holding company operating a savings bank that offers mortgage loans, commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, agricultural real estate and operating loans, adjustable-rate home equity lines of credit, certificates of deposit, savings accounts, NOW accounts, and money market accounts. The company also invests in mortgage-backed securities and investment securities, and utilizes FHLB advances and interest rate swap hedges to manage interest rate risk.

products.name: Mortgage Loans
products.description: Fixed and adjustable-rate residential mortgage loans including single-family residential loans.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Fixed and adjustable-rate commercial real estate and multi-family loan originations.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Commercial business lending products with shorter repricing periods and higher yields.

products.name: Agricultural Loans
products.description: Agricultural real estate and agricultural operating lines of credit.

products.name: Home Equity Lines of Credit
products.description: Adjustable-rate home equity lines of credit totaling $86.7 million at June 30, 2025.

products.name: Certificates of Deposit
products.description: CDs with maturities up to five years; CDs with original terms of two or more years totaled $322.5 million.

products.name: Money Market Accounts
products.description: Competitively priced money market deposit accounts.

products.name: Secondary Market Mortgage Originations
products.description: Fixed-rate residential loans originated for sale into the secondary market; $21.6 million in fiscal 2025.

partnerships.description: Utilizes FHLB advances for funding and interest rate risk management, including fixed-rate advances up to 10-year maturities.
